titleStmt.title: No Institution record, No Institution record, CJN-002
Psalter

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

title.span: No item: LIT2000Mazmur, could not check for Ps1

msItem.incipit:
ተግሣጽ፡ ፍካሬ፡ ዘጻድቃን፡ ወዘኃጥአን። መዝሙር፡ ዘዳዊት፡ ሃሌ፡ ሉያ። ፩ ፩
ብፁዕ፡ ብእሲ፡ ዘኢሖረ፡ በምክረ፡ ረሲዓን። ወዘኢቆመ፡ ውስተ፡ ፍኖተ፡ ኃጥአን።

title.span: No item: LIT2000Mazmur, could not check for Ps2

msItem.incipit: ትንቢት፡ በእንተ፡ ክርስቶስ። ለምንት፡ አንገለጉ፡ አሕዛብ። ወሕዝብኒ፡ ነበቡ፡ ከንቶ።

msItem.title: Mazmura Dāwit, Psalmus 3
msItem.incipit: እግዚኦ፡ ሚበዝኁ፡ እለ፡ ይሣቅዩኒ። ፫ ብዙኃን፡ ቆሙ ላዕሌየ።

msItem.title: Mazmura Dāwit, Psalmus 4
msItem.incipit: ፬፡ ሶበ፡ ጸዋዕክዎ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ሰምዓኒ፡ ጽድቅየ፡ ወእምንዳቤየ፡ አርኀበ፡ ሊተ።

title.span: No item: LIT2000Mazmur, could not check for Ps7

incipit.hi: ፯ እግዚኦ፡ አምላኪየ፡ ብከ፡ ተወከልኩ፡ ወኢትግድፈኒ፡
፰፡ እግዚኦ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ጥቀ፡ ተሰብሐ፡ ስምክ፡ በኵሉ፡ ምድር፡

msItem.note: The beginning of the text is missing.

supportDesc.foliation: Foliated by the cataloguer in the right lower corner. Foliation error after : one leaf not foliated (fol. 74 bis).
supportDesc.condition: Stains of water and dirt throughout the manuscript. First two quires have been reattached to the binding with a green thread. Textile inlays of the binding are almost lost. The leather cover of the binding is rubbed off and damaged by insects.

handNote.seg: First one or two lines in the beginning of the text and text sections; punctuation marks; name of God, Mary, and angels; single letters and words.

item.desc: The name of the owner and the scribe has been erased.

binding.decoNote: Two wooden boards covered with tooled leather.

history.acquisition: The manuscript was acquired in Ethiopia in 1963-1966.

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Created entry, added physical description and content.
merged correction to text from images by Asnake
